answers: A contract is a legally binding agreement between two or more parties that outlines rights, obligations, and terms. It can be written or verbal, though written is always safer.
Contract holo dui ba totodhik party er moddhe ekta legal agreement ja tader odhikar ar dayitto nirdhaaron korey.
A valid contract needs an offer, acceptance, consideration (something of value exchanged), legal capacity of both parties, and a lawful purpose.
Breaking a contract (breach) can have legal consequences like paying damages. However, some contracts have exit clauses, and courts may void contracts made under fraud or duress.
